name: governed-agent-autonomy-skills
description: Coding-agent skills for GAAM-style enterprise agent design, implementation, and review. Self-contained.

interface.shortDescription: GAAM-style design / implement / review for enterprise agents
interface.longDescription: Five skills routing coding agents through assessing GAAM levels, designing enterprise agents, implementing GAAM capability patterns, and reviewing changes for control activation and evidence — with naming-agnostic recognition of existing systems.
defaultPrompt: What GAAM level is this agent at?
Design an enterprise agent for <use case>.
Review this PR for GAAM compliance.
